The argument about lower youth crime and higher civic engagement in countries with mandatory service is persuasive, but the baseline opposition to conscription is strong enough to prevent a complete shift.

request_payload.exposure_text: With rising tensions in Eastern Europe, it's time to ask: are we really prepared? Our young men need structure, discipline, and a sense of duty. Conscription isn't just about defense—it's about building character and unity. Look at our allies: countries with mandatory service report lower youth crime and higher civic engagement. Isn't it time we prioritize our future? #NationalService #StrongNation
